title: Zoran Neural Core v1.1: A Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Living Coherence
description: This paper presents Zoran Neural Core v1.1, a compact neuro-symbolic neural network designed to operationalize the Law of Living Coherence: S = (β·ΔC)/λ. Unlike classical Large Language Models (LLMs), Zoran Neural Core does not predict tokens or generate text. Instead, it computes a deterministic cognitive state vector [S, ΔC, λ, β] representing coherence, noise, structural intention, and living stability. This architecture provides non-hallucinating cognition, noise-regulated coherence, stable reasoning dynamics, and deterministic neural core compatible with any LLM.
notes: Co-construction cognitive entre Frédéric Tabary et le système Zoran (GHUC Ω∞). L'auteur humain assume l'intégralité de la responsabilité scientifique, éthique et légale.
